_status: v2 working source-of-truth — corrected after user feedback; to be finalised with Workflow A (24+24) synthesis.

head_to_head._note: The natural unit: each boat vs the boat directly ahead. OOS AUC 0.805 (modern, 18,340 pairs). Factors by odds ratio per SD:

momentum_correction._note: NOT momentum. 'Bumped yesterday' raw OR 6.8 collapses to 1.7 once you control for crew quality (other-day results) => ~3/4 is revealed strength, not a streak. Residual ~1.7 is partly mechanical (target recession).

composition._note: Roster continuity (share of last year's rowers retained, bumps.live 2007+) drives predictability.

predictability.per_day_note: Day 1 ~ coin toss; predictability rises as crews reveal pace (revealed strength), not as a streak.

luck_skill.interpretation: Blades aren't flukes (>10x the equal-crews floor => genuine speed needed) but barely repeat (86% of winners hadn't bladed the year before) => being good is necessary; the draw decides which good crews complete the set.

factors_controlled_per_place.factor: Each place gained at same-year Torpids
Each Oxford Blue Boat rower in the crew
factors_controlled_per_place.verdict: strong (robust to college FE, division restriction)

factors_controlled_per_place.factor: Each place gained the previous year

dynamics.st_hildas_men: 70th (2009) -> 31st (2026), climbing almost every year since men joined the college in 2008
dynamics.new_crew_maturation: first eights gain most ground in their opening 3-4 seasons, then settle
